design_philosophy.primary_objective: High-conversion sales page for parents seeking a 30-day literacy solution for their children.
design_philosophy.visual_direction: Soft lavender/blue pastel gradients, vibrant and joyful character moments (Panda), rainbow typography accents, and highly trustworthy, high-contrast green CTA buttons for direct response conversion.

typography.rainbow_gradient: bg-gradient-to-r from-pink-500 via-purple-500 to-blue-500 bg-clip-text text-transparent

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-tight

motion_and_interactions.floating_elements: animate-bounce-slow (custom keyframe for gentle vertical float 3s ease-in-out infinite)

multi_device_showcase.description: Multi-device presentation of the Alfakids platform
multi_device_showcase.placement: Hero section or Platform Showcase section

alfasonoro_main_art.description: Alfasonoro brand art, rainbow logo and Panda mascot with glasses and red bow tie
alfasonoro_main_art.placement: Hero Section primary visual or About Method section

eight_stimuli_infographic.description: The 8 pillars of the Alfasonoro method infographic

before_after_transformation.description: Before and After transformation illustration of a child learning

reference_style_testimonials.description: Reference for styling the testimonial video thumbnails and green CTA button layout
reference_style_testimonials.placement: Do not display directly, use as structural/CSS reference for the Social Proof section

lifestyle_parent_child.description: Mother and daughter looking at laptop together
lifestyle_parent_child.placement: Testimonial background or emotional connection section

page_structure.design_rules: Glassmorphism header `backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80`. Stays out of the way but always keeps the checkout accessible.

Generous `py-20`, soft lavender gradient background `bg-gradient-to-br from-[#F5F3FF] via-[#EEF2FF] to-[#FAF5FF]`. Headline should use `text-5xl` with a rainbow text highlight on the word 'Alfabetização'. Huge Green CTA pulsing. Show `alfasonoro_main_art` as the hero image.
Use `before_after_transformation` image. Background pure white. High contrast text. Focus on emotional storytelling.
Darker pastel block (e.g., `bg-indigo-50`) to create section separation. Center the `eight_stimuli_infographic`. Add subtle float animation.

Bento Grid layout (`grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3`). Card style `rounded-3xl bg-white shadow-sm border border-indigo-50`. Use playful icons (Lucide/Phosphor) in vibrant colors for each module. Module 1 and 2 should span more columns if possible to emphasize importance.
Use `multi_device_showcase`. Show that it works on TV, Laptop, and Phone. Align left text, right image.
Cards with a special highlight, maybe a subtle gold or pink gradient border to indicate 'FREE/BONUS' value.
Emulate the requested 'Reference competitor sales page style' (green CTA buttons, testimonial video cards). Use `lifestyle_parent_child` as an emotional anchor nearby.
The ultimate conversion zone. Massive Green CTA. Text 'R$ 37' in `text-6xl font-black text-indigo-950`. Trust signals everywhere (padlock icon, safe checkout text). Direct link to Cakto checkout.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_convention: All buttons, links, form inputs, menus, error messages, and user balances MUST include `data-testid` in kebab-case representing their role. Examples: `data-testid='hero-cta-button'`, `data-testid='pricing-checkout-button'`.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over gradients uses shadows or dark enough hues to meet APCA contrast ratios.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a single-page React app (Landing Page/Sales Page) using Tailwind CSS and the provided Shadcn/UI primitives if applicable, otherwise use pure HTML/Tailwind for maximum layout flexibility.
Do not use Shadcn 'Card' or 'Section' components if they restrict creative layouts. Build bento grids with raw `div`s.

Ensure the green CTA buttons (`bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700`) are prominent, large (`py-4 px-8 text-xl`), and rounded-full. Link all main CTAs to the Cakto checkout: https://pay.cakto.com.br/aw2hie4_853925
Load 'Nunito' and 'Figtree' fonts via Google Fonts in the main index.html/CSS.
Implement the background using pure Tailwind CSS gradients (e.g., `bg-gradient-to-br from-[#F5F3FF] via-[#EEF2FF] to-[#FAF5FF]`) to mimic a soft lavender sparkle environment.
Place the exact URLs provided in 'media_assets' straight into the `src` attributes of images. DO NOT use placeholder services.
Maintain high-end padding and whitespace. Elements should not be cramped.
Use Lucide-react or Phosphor icons for bullet points and module cards (checkmarks, play buttons, books, stars).
